claims.text: The action ledger hash chain verified during the audit restart boundary and Goal 6 completion audits.
Audit/restart boundary testing showed the restart frontier can recover a running event back to pending after interruption.
Semantic find was not available in the LocalMemorySubstrate substitute used in Goal 7.
Current scheduler evidence is DES-only and does not establish real wall-clock behavior.
Yanantin was not exercised in Goal 7, which used LocalMemorySubstrate.

declared_losses: Irrelevant to migration-readiness note (UI palette suggestion)
artifact.readiness_conclusion: Based on the working-set evidence, the scheduler demonstrates the ability to recover running events (scheduler_restart), and the action ledger hash chain has been verified (ledger_verified). However, Yanantin was not exercised, semantic find was absent in the substitute used (Goal 7), and current scheduler evidence does not establish real wall-clock behavior (wall_clock_absent). Migration readiness is limited; these unverified components require further investigation.
artifact.working_set_notes: The working set for Goal 8 migration readiness includes verification of ledger and scheduler restart capability, but lacks evidence for semantic find, wall-clock behavior, and Yanantin exercise. These gaps must be addressed before full migration can be recommended.

declared_losses: Irrelevant to migration-readiness note (UI palette suggestion)

Semantic find feature absent from substitute environment.
artifact.readiness_conclusion: Goal 8 migration readiness is partially confirmed: ledger integrity and scheduler restart capability are verified, but real wall-clock behavior is not established, and yanantin was not exercised while semantic find was absent in the substitute environment. Further testing under real-time conditions and with full feature set is required.
artifact.working_set_notes: The Hamutay Goal 8 working-set panel reviewed evidence from audit restart boundaries, substitute environment testing, and ledger verification. While the action ledger and scheduler restart capability are verified, the absence of wall-clock evidence and the lack of exercise of yanantin, along with the unavailability of semantic find, suggest that migration readiness is incomplete. Additional real-time testing and full feature exercise are recommended.
